title: hypericum floridum
intro: Hypericum floridum, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Eastern Europe and Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of St. John's Wort include tea, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin irritations and wounds.
